market_briefing.summary: Global markets on March 20, 2026, show signs of rebound as Middle East geopolitical tensions ease and oil prices stabilize, though software stocks remain under pressure from AI-related volatility.
highlights: Easing Middle East tensions lead to market stabilization; oil prices show signs of cooling.
Global central banks remain hawkish as energy-driven inflation risks persist despite volatility.
Market 'AI Scare Trade' continues to weigh on software stocks, maintaining broader equity fragility.
Gold maintains momentum, trading above $5,150/oz amid continued structural demand.
Indian markets saw a modest rebound on Friday following significant selloffs, tracking stabilized energy cues.
